code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for t in tokens
    if first
      out = "#{t} #{t}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{t} #{t}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
